channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed

item.title: After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recoverin…
item.author: Governor Tim Walz (@governorwalz.mn.gov)
item.description:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.
item.content:encoded:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.

item.title: It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatric…
item.author: DR. IRONCLAD, Brunch Democrat (@feclad.bsky.social)
item.description:
It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatrics, no flops, no whining...just playing

It's the women. I'm watching a women's game
item.content:encoded:
It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatrics, no flops, no whining...just playing

It's the women. I'm watching a women's game

item.title: Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came chargi…
item.author: Stoned Yeti 👽 (@stonedmcyeti.bsky.social)
item.description:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶
item.content:encoded:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶

item.title: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page …
item.author: Amy Mode Activated 🪷 ᓚᘏᗢ ಇ. (@activateamymode.bsky.social)
item.description: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣
item.content:encoded: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣

item.title: 笑って学べる「科学漫才」30年 全国の科学館で実験ショー www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO..…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
笑って学べる「科学漫才」30年　全国の科学館で実験ショー
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

科学家楽狂（かがくやらっきょ）を名乗り1000回以上ステージに立った筆者。

ゴムパッチン芸も弾性エネルギーを学ぶ題材です。

「笑いに厳しい大阪の子にはだいぶ鍛えられた」
item.content:encoded:
笑って学べる「科学漫才」30年　全国の科学館で実験ショー
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

科学家楽狂（かがくやらっきょ）を名乗り1000回以上ステージに立った筆者。

ゴムパッチン芸も弾性エネルギーを学ぶ題材です。

「笑いに厳しい大阪の子にはだいぶ鍛えられた」

item.title: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. H…
item.author: Alt National Park Service (@altnps.bsky.social)
item.description: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.
item.content:encoded: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.

item.title: Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing …
item.author: Eloise Powers (@elnopower.bsky.social)
item.description:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma
item.content:encoded:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma

item.title: 【沖縄・首里城の「見せる復興」を歩く】 2019年の焼失から約7年―。沖縄のシンボル・首里城（那覇市）は、今年11月に…
item.author: 産経ニュース (@sankei.com)
item.description:
【沖縄・首里城の「見せる復興」を歩く】
2019年の焼失から約7年―。沖縄のシンボル・首里城（那覇市）は、今年11月に正殿の復元工事が完成を迎える。1712年の創建から戦前までの姿をベースに、沖縄県産木材や伝統的な漆塗りを用いて再建される令和の首里城。総工費約120億円をかけた復元作業の様子は、一般の入園者も見学することができる。熱気あふれる、「今しか見られない」復元の現場を歩いた。
item.content:encoded:
【沖縄・首里城の「見せる復興」を歩く】
2019年の焼失から約7年―。沖縄のシンボル・首里城（那覇市）は、今年11月に正殿の復元工事が完成を迎える。1712年の創建から戦前までの姿をベースに、沖縄県産木材や伝統的な漆塗りを用いて再建される令和の首里城。総工費約120億円をかけた復元作業の様子は、一般の入園者も見学することができる。熱気あふれる、「今しか見られない」復元の現場を歩いた。

item.author: Holly Darling 🌸 (@hollydarling.bsky.social)
item.description:
I got these cute bags for when I’m giving people my sourdough and dang it looks like I’m a proper baker now 🥰

item.title: In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings that involved a moving vehicle between 2015 and 2021. Over that same time period, public records show ICE agents shooting at least 59 people total and killing at least 23.

Not a single indictment resulted from those incidents.
item.content:encoded:
In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings that involved a moving vehicle between 2015 and 2021. Over that same time period, public records show ICE agents shooting at least 59 people total and killing at least 23.

Not a single indictment resulted from those incidents.

item.title: The Trump administration finalized a rule Friday that change…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump administration finalized a rule Friday that changes how agencies enforce the Endangered Species Act. The administration narrowed the definition of "harm" under the landmark law. n.pr/4wWVo0H
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration finalized a rule Friday that changes how agencies enforce the Endangered Species Act. The administration narrowed the definition of "harm" under the landmark law. n.pr/4wWVo0H

item.title: Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral sho…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral shock in the wake of the Supreme Court’s decision gutting the Voting Rights Act.

But as the surprise wears off, a sense of isolation has begun to set in among some.

🔗 politi.co/4vSW46T
item.content:encoded:
Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral shock in the wake of the Supreme Court’s decision gutting the Voting Rights Act.

But as the surprise wears off, a sense of isolation has begun to set in among some.

🔗 politi.co/4vSW46T

item.title: Mat Bell’s eye-catching photograph is one of the shortlisted…
item.author: Stuart Chambers (@projectourworld.bsky.social)
item.description:
Mat Bell’s eye-catching photograph is one of the shortlisted entries for the Australian Geographic nature photographer of the year 2026 .

An Adélie penguin to propel itself from the water to the safety of an iceberg.

Photograph: Mat Bell/Australian Geographic
item.content:encoded:
Mat Bell’s eye-catching photograph is one of the shortlisted entries for the Australian Geographic nature photographer of the year 2026 .

An Adélie penguin to propel itself from the water to the safety of an iceberg.

Photograph: Mat Bell/Australian Geographic
